report.summary: Standup v11 (~10:05 CET): 338 pages live (+3 since v10 — glossary, ecosystem hub, eigenlayer published via Day 40 batch), PUBLISH_QUEUE at 10 items (2 fresh build-v8 guides + 8 ecosystem/learn), rate limiter still 0/6 public routes with FOMC T-1 tomorrow, 432 staged files still blocked by next.config.ts + middleware conflict — all 6 agents ran last cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v10 (~09:14 CET)
items: Pages live: 338 (+3 from v10's 335). Day 40 publish cycle promoted /glossary, /ecosystem, /ecosystem/hyperliquid, /ecosystem/eigenlayer, /learn/ai-crypto-agents-guide. However previous v10 count was 335, current PUBLISHED_PAGES Set has 338 entries — net +3 since last standup (some entries may have been present but uncounted).

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 10 items. 2 fresh from build-v8 (data-availability-layer-guide-2026, defi-options-trading-guide-2026) + 5 ecosystem deep-dives (aave, lido, uniswap, compound, curve) + 3 learn guides (ai-depin, advanced-defi-strategies, news). Queue refilled after Day 40 drain.

Build-v8 shipped 2 new learn guides: Data Availability Layer Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, DALayerComparison.tsx interactive component, Celestia/EigenDA/Avail) and DeFi Options Trading Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, OptionsPayoffCalculator wired in, Derive/Stryke/Panoptic). Both in PUBLISH_QUEUE, ready for next batch.

Design-v8 shipped whale-watch page refactor: split server/client, fixed all broken CSS vars, added glass-morphism + loading skeletons + breadcrumbs + ARIA accessibility fixes. Also improved courses/[slug] mobile layout and badges theme consistency.

Community-v23 drafted social content for 3 new pages: DA Layer Wars thread (Fri Mar 20), DeFi Options thread (Sat Mar 21), Hyperliquid HIP-3 tweet (Thu Mar 19). Newsletter additions queued for Thu edition. OG social cards created for DA Layer + DeFi Options guides.

EOD-v10 confirmed: 337 pages audited, 237 with page.tsx, 100 missing (29.7% gap). All 6 API routes healthy. Rate limiter still unwired. 3 build-fix commits landed today (538e7e4, e36d391, 1b4a15e). No new regressions.

Top content signals: Tax guide (+90%, April 15 = 30 days out), Pectra upgrade guide (+91%, ~25 days to upgrade), Altcoin ETF tracker (+91%, only free tracker), DeFAI guide (+89%, hottest March narrative).

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ publish Day 40 — 5 pages promoted (glossary, ecosystem hub, hyperliquid, eigenlayer, ai-crypto-agents-guide). Vercel deploy 49kaUPaRG triggered.
SHIPPED ✅ build-v8 — 2 new learn guides (DA Layer, DeFi Options) with interactive components. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v8 — whale-watch page refactor (server/client split, CSS fix, a11y), courses mobile fix, badges theme fix, OG image for whale-watch.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v23 — Social calendar extended through Mar 22. 3 new OG cards. Newsletter content queued for Thu Mar 19.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v10 — Full QA pass. No regressions. 6/6 API routes healthy.
SHIPPED ✅ 3 build-fix commits today — 538e7e4 (use-client split), e36d391 (market-recap split), 1b4a15e (ecosystem routes + stargate JSX).
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts still drops `output: 'standalone'` — 5th consecutive cycle flagged. 432 files bottled up.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — 3 routes go 404 if committed.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict still unresolved.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. Only cache-stats + health have it. FOMC T-1 (Wed Mar 18). checkRateLimit() exists in rate-limiter.ts but NOT imported in prices, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields, fear-greed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 100/337 published slugs still missing page.tsx (~30% returning 404 in prod).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 DefiLlama /api/defi-yields fallback still missing — returns error on total API failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial ~7 days remaining — Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory) — non-blocking but should fix.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Wire rate limiter to all 6 public API routes TODAY. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-1). This is a ~30 min programmer task that has been P0 carry-over for 5+ cycles. Import checkRateLimit() into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. Zero excuses — ship this cycle.

PRIORITY 2 — Resolve staged blockers and commit the 432-file batch. Three steps: (1) git restore --staged next.config.ts; (2) verify intent on badges/courses deletions; (3) resolve middleware.ts conflict. This unblocks crypto-cards hub (31 pages), 92 compare pages, 4 API routes. Real SEO momentum locked up for 5 cycles.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote 2 fresh build-v8 guides from PUBLISH_QUEUE + add DefiLlama fallback. data-availability-layer-guide-2026 and defi-options-trading-guide-2026 are ready with interactive components, OG images, and social content pre-drafted. Simultaneously add hardcoded fallback to /api/defi-yields before FOMC traffic surge.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Two timed content spikes converging: Tax season (April 15, 30 days) and Ethereum Pectra upgrade (~25 days). Consider pinning tax guide + Pectra guide to homepage hero and Twitter bio. DeFi options ($342B/mo, +872% YoY) is the emerging narrative — guide positioned perfectly. Next build cycle Day 41: Solana vs Ethereum 2026 deep-dive (thread already drafted for Mar 20) or MEV Guide 2026 (thread drafted for Mar 22).
